<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.17 -->

# server

Backend server module for attractor-web Leptos SSR application. Manages SQLite persistence for project metadata, file watching for `.pas/` directory documents, 3-phase pipeline execution orchestration (decompose → scaffold → run), real-time SSE streaming for execution events, and WebSocket PTY bridge for persistent embedded terminals.

## Contents

### Database Layer

- [db.rs](./db.rs) — SQLite schema via sqlx. `Project` {id, folder_path, name}, `CachedDoc` {doc_type, content}. `init_db()` creates `$HOME/.pas/web.db`. `upsert_project`, `list_open_projects`, `get_documents`, `upsert_document` CRUD operations.

### Document Watching

- [documents.rs](./documents.rs) — `notify` watcher for `.pas/prd.md` and `.pas/spec.md`. `DocumentWatcher` with broadcast channel (capacity 16). `document_stream` SSE endpoint serves initial DB state then live updates. Lazy initialization via `AppState.watchers` HashMap.

### Execution Orchestration

- [execute.rs](./execute.rs) — `start_execution` Leptos server function. Validates spec, invokes `pas decompose` → parses epic_id → `pas scaffold` → DOT parsing via `attractor_dot::parse` → `attractor_pipeline::PipelineGraph::from_dot` → `run_pipeline_with_streaming`. Publishes SSE events: `node_start`, `node_complete`, `pipeline_complete`.

### Project Management

- [projects.rs](./projects.rs) — Leptos server functions: `list_open_projects`, `open_project`, `close_project`, `get_cached_documents`, `list_directory`. `scaffold_attractor_config` creates `.pas/CLAUDE.md` from bundled templates. `DirEntry` for folder picker (filters `name.starts_with('.')`, injects ".." parent entry).

### Real-time Streaming

- [stream.rs](./stream.rs) — Session-based SSE via `stream_events`. `publish_event` to broadcast channels (capacity 100). `SESSION_STATE` ring buffer retains last 100 events for replay. `cleanup_inactive_sessions` purges 0-receiver channels.

### Terminal Bridge

- [terminal.rs](./terminal.rs) — WebSocket PTY bridge `ws_terminal`. `TerminalSession` persists `MasterPty` across disconnects (30min idle reaper). Spawns `claude` process in project directory. Wire protocol: JSON `{"type":"session","session_id":"..."}` then binary PTY I/O, resize commands `{"type":"resize","cols":N,"rows":N}`.

### Module Root

- [mod.rs](./mod.rs) — Exports all submodules. Defines `AppState` {db: SqlitePool, watchers: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<i64, Arc<DocumentWatcher>>>>, terminal_sessions: TerminalSessions}.

## Architecture

`AppState` centralizes shared resources. `documents.rs` populates `watchers` HashMap on first SSE connection per project. `execute.rs` spawns background pipeline execution, streams events via `stream::publish_event`. `terminal.rs` maintains PTY processes independent of WebSocket lifecycle (survives page refresh, 30min timeout). Database at `~/.pas/web.db` stores project metadata and cached document contents; filesystem at `{folder_path}/.pas/` holds live PRD/Spec files watched by `notify`.

## Stack

- **Framework**: Leptos (SSR mode), Axum
- **Database**: SQLite via sqlx, tokio runtime
- **File Watching**: notify (RecommendedWatcher, NonRecursive)
- **Streaming**: tokio::sync::broadcast, axum::response::sse
- **PTY**: portable-pty (MasterPty, PtySize)
- **External**: `pas` CLI binary (decompose, scaffold commands)

## API Surface

**Leptos Server Functions:**

- `list_open_projects() -> Vec<Project>`
- `open_project(folder_path: String) -> Project`
- `close_project(project_id: i64) -> ()`
- `get_cached_documents(project_id: i64) -> CachedDocs`
- `list_directory(path: String) -> Vec<DirEntry>`
- `start_execution(project_id: i64) -> ExecutionResponse` {session_id, epic_id, pipeline_path}

**HTTP Endpoints:**

- `GET /api/documents?project_id={id}` — SSE stream via `document_stream`
- `GET /api/stream/{session_id}` — SSE execution events via `stream_events`
- `GET /ws/terminal?session={id}&folder={path}` — WebSocket PTY via `ws_terminal`

## Behavioral Contracts

**Document Watching:**

- Filename matching: exact `"prd.md"` → `"prd"`, `"spec.md"` → `"spec"`
- Event kinds: `Modify(_) | Create(_)`
- SSE event types: `"document_update"` (payload), `"error"` (failure)
- Watch path: `{folder_path}/.pas` (RecursiveMode::NonRecursive)
- Tracing patterns: `"Document updated: {} ({} bytes)"`, `"Watching {:?} for document changes (project_id: {})"`

**Execution Pipeline:**

- Status mapping: `Success`→`"success"`, `PartialSuccess`→`"partial_success"`, `Retry`→`"retry"`, `Fail`→`"fail"`, `Skipped`→`"skipped"`
- Event schemas:
  - `{"type": "node_start", "node_id": "...", "label": "..."}`
  - `{"type": "node_complete", "node_id": "...", "status": "...", "cost_usd": ..., "notes": ...}`
  - `{"type": "pipeline_complete", "total_cost_usd": ..., "completed_nodes": [...]}`
- Context keys: `workdir` (CWD), `outcome` (execution result), `preferred_label` (edge selection), `cost_usd` (accumulated)
- Terminal nodes detected via `shape == "Msquare"`

**Streaming:**

- State sync payload: `{"type": "state_sync", "events": ["..."], "timestamp": "2024-..."}` (RFC3339)
- Broadcast capacity: `100` per session
- Session retention: last `100` events via `drain(0..events.len() - 100)`

**Terminal:**

- Resize JSON: `{"type":"resize","cols":N,"rows":N}`
- Session init JSON: `{"type":"session","session_id":"<uuid>"}`
- Idle reaper: `Duration::from_secs(30 * 60)` (30 minutes)
- Binary frames for PTY stdout/stdin

**Project Scaffolding:**

- Template header: [projects.annex.sum](./projects.annex.sum) contains `ATTRACTOR_CLAUDE_MD_HEADER`
- Error strings: `"No database pool"`, `"Path does not exist: {}"`, `"Path is not a directory: {}"`, `"HOME environment variable not set"`
- Hidden filter: `name_str.starts_with('.')` excludes directories in folder picker
- Parent navigation: adds `".."` entry when `dir_path.parent().is_some() && dir_path.parent() != Some(Path::new(""))`

**Database:**

- Path: `$HOME/.pas/web.db` (mode=rwc)
- Schema defaults: `datetime('now')` for `last_used`, `created_at`, `updated_at`
- Projects unique constraint: `folder_path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE`

## File Relationships

`db.rs` primitives consumed by `documents.rs` (persist cached docs), `projects.rs` (CRUD), `execute.rs` (fetch project paths). `stream.rs` utilities consumed by `execute.rs` (publish pipeline events). `mod.rs` `AppState` injected into all Axum handlers via `State`. `execute.rs` depends on external crates `attractor_dot` (DOT parsing) and `attractor_pipeline` (graph execution). `projects.rs` templates loaded via `load_bundled_template` searching relative to executable path.
